name: Celestia Webster
quote: Had a severe headache when I awoke and did not get up till eight o’clock, was in time for breakfast however.

name: Celestia Webster
quote: Felt miserable again this morning having a dull headache still and paining me much whenever I bowed my head.

name: Celestia Webster
quote: In the morning my hands were so stiff that I could hardly use them, but commenced sewing on Lawrence’s clothes and spent the day sewing.

name: Celestia Webster
quote: I arose with a severe headache which continued all day making me feel miserable enough

name: Celestia Webster
quote: Spent a miserable night, my head pained me so, was very restless indeed waking up often arose at half past eight o’clock, read a few chapters from Hebrews, but found I could not read on account of my head Therefore I sit or lopped around on the lounges listening to what the others were doing or else communing with my own thoughts, which were not very pleasant

name: Celestia Webster
quote: Awoke with a headache which continued to grow worse during the day.  I sewed some in the forenoon but it made my headache worse...at dinner time I could scarcely eat and went to bed at seven o’clock P.M

name: Celestia Webster
quote: fall over a fence and hurt one of my limbs considerably beside making quite a rent in my stocking...was forced after my fall to limp some as I walked

name: Celestia Webster
quote: More pleasant. School with its duties occupied my time & I can say that when not worn out I enjoy the labors of the school room.

name: Celestia Webster
quote: Arose with a severe headache...My head ached severely & I gave up work a little before night and lay down to rest, my eyes fell

name: Celestia Webster
quote: My cold is not much if any better - I have the chance of being exposed so many times that I expect to have them (exposure to mumps)

name: Celestia Webster
quote: My cold is about the same

name: Celestia Webster
quote: My head felt very badly, but this morning it was better

name: Celestia Webster
quote: I by that time way feeling very badly, Something that I had eaten or else the cold water that I drank caused one to feel miserably

name: Celestia Webster
quote: Felt some better this morning than I did last night, though I could eat but little breakfast

name: Celestia Webster
quote: My head is aching today...I went to bed after breakfast my head felt so bad and did not get up till after twelve o’clock

name: Celestia Webster
quote: By the time i got through with them my head felt very bad

name: Celestia Webster
quote: I had a severe headache

name: Celestia Webster
quote: My arm is quite lame from my forenoons work

name: Celestia Webster
quote: In the evening worked at hair flowers. It is too hard work for my eyes. I feel sensible of it, and were it not that I do not wish to have their flowers spoiled I would not work at it.

name: Celestia Webster
quote: having a severe pain in my head

name: Celestia Webster
quote: “Prov. 13.22 A good man leaveth an inheritance to his children’s children” For some reason I did not feel very much interested, was very sleepy

name: Celestia Webster
quote: Most of the scholars were present. I got pretty tired. Started for home met Mr. W. and Eune, they were coming after me. I was pleased for it was raining

name: Celestia Webster
quote: I became very tired before school closed besides having a severe pain in my head. I tried to feel thankful it was no worse, I have had much worse pain in my head Came home, perfectly willing to rest my wearied limbs.

name: Celestia Webster
quote: ... but concluded I did not care for I was completely tired out and chose to ride instead of walking. School was full as usual. I forgot to bring home my roll tonight. Hope I shall find it safe in the morning. Am exceedingly tired.

name: Celestia Webster
quote: ...when I arose, was not feeling very well last night, and was glad that I had the privilege of lying in bed and resting and was tired most out

name: Celestia Webster
quote: We had a very pleasant time I felt bad, and was glad to get home, when I took a large dose of ginger

name: Celestia Webster
quote: I have not felt very well, and I’m tired out tonight

name: Celestia Webster
quote: I am not feeling very well

name: Celestia Webster
quote: School passed off very well. I am very tired tired tonight have done but very little finished my stocking

name: Celestia Webster
quote: Eld. Brown preached. Text. Had a very good discourse only he repeated considerable Became very tired and did not attend in the evening

name: Celestia Webster
quote: Eune is feeling very badly today and Mrs. W is also on the sick list...Vernelia has a hard cold, and I find that I have a cold too

name: Celestia Webster
quote: I was very tired and almost sick and my head ached considerable my eyes felt very bad

name: Celestia Webster
quote: I was tired out; having talked so much and I have such a cold.

name: Celestia Webster
quote: my cold is no better and it hurts me to talk aloud

name: Celestia Webster
quote: I have a hard cold and am trying to get rid of it
